q: How to align engineering specs with current component availability in real-time
diagnostic: A design choice in the PLM that creates a 52-week lead time in the SCM is not engineering — it is legacy thinking. The Prime Visionary and COO agent pair bridges PLM and SCM data to maintain product launch integrity.

description: R&D stagnation — the 'Maintenance Tax' eats the Innovation Budget. Engineers spend 80% on refactoring the refactor.
symptom: R&D budget grows, feature release cycle slows. $20M Series B spent on keeping the lights on.
